reference: Do an abdominal ultrasound. Also, stop taking ibuprofen and try tramadol tablets or a combination of tramadol with paracetamol. A urine routine test is also required, along with serum creatinine. With these reports, check with your doctor.
text: Do an abdominal ultrasound. Also, stop taking ibuprofen and tramadol tablets, or a combination of tramadol with paracetamol. A urine routine test is also required, along with serum creatinine. With these reports, check with your doctor.
